title: Baby and Baby Bear Bedtime
text:
## Bedtime Checklist

**For Baby and Baby Bear:**

- Draw a {adjective} bath
- Find the {adjective} pajamas with {plural noun} on them
- Read one {adjective} story about {animal} who learn to {verb}

**Baby Bear:** Requires {adjective} honey on a {adjective} spoon and will {verb} if the room is too {adjective}.

**Baby:** Prefers the {adjective} lullaby sung {adverb} while rocking the {adjective} chair.

**Lights out:** {number} o'clock.

**If either wakes up:** Offer a {adjective} hug and do not mention {plural noun} until morning.
